Windows 10/11 x64 **MSI** and **NSIS (.exe)** may appear under Assets (since v1.0.2).

| Item | Note |
|------|------|
| **CI** | Built by GitHub Actions; pytest and packaging checks pass |
| **Smoke test** | Maintainers have **not** completed full manual smoke on physical Win10/11 ([#23](https://github.com/fancy1108/Clutch/issues/23)) |
| **Code signing** | **None** — SmartScreen may warn; verify SHA-256 and Release source first |

Report issues: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/fancy1108/Clutch/issues/new/choose) (include installer filename and Windows version).
